name: nav-rail
title: Nav Rail
description: Fixed icon-over-label edge rail for switching modes or destinations.

api.description: Fixed icon-over-label edge rail for switching modes or destinations. Width is locked; items do not expand into an inspector. Compose NavRail, NavRailItem, and optional NavRailSeparator. Use asChild on items to render a link host.

groups.title: NavRail
groups.description: Full-height edge strip. Place on the left or right of a workspace shell.

props.name: side
props.description: Which edge the rail sits on. Draws the inner border on the opposite side of the edge.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the rail root.

props.name: …nav attributes
props.description: Native nav attributes on the rail root.

groups.title: NavRailItem
groups.description: Centered icon with a short label underneath. Set active for the current destination. With asChild, pass a single element child (for example a link) and put the label text inside that child.

props.name: active
props.description: Marks the current destination and styles the icon plate.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Merge item props onto a single child element. The child becomes the interactive root; icon and label render inside it.

props.name: children
props.description: Short label when asChild is false. When asChild is true, a single element whose children are the label text.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes on the item root.

props.name: …button attributes
props.description: Native button attributes when asChild is false. With asChild, compatible props merge onto the child.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div attributes on the separator.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-nav-rail-width
props.type: Fixed rail width sized for icon plus short label.
